findings.description: `UsersEntity` is referenced in s2 code examples (e.g., `@ValidationTarget public void setUser(UsersEntity user)` and the final test verification sentence) but is absent from the s2 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source s2 implementation code: `public void setUser(UsersEntity user)` and final paragraph: `UsersEntityの単項目精査呼び出しが行われていることを確認する`

findings.description: The source h2 section 'Formクラスの精査処理実装' contains well over 2000 chars of plain text and has four h3 subsections (テストデータ作成, 単体テスト実行×2, 精査処理実装). The knowledge file merges all of these into a single section s2 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 'Formクラスの精査処理実装': 'Formクラスに実装する精査処理の単体テストを作成', 'Formクラスの単体テストを実行' (×2), 'Formクラスに精査処理を実装'
